title: Big K Barbeque Firelighter Odourless Gel - BBQs, Firepits - Fires & Log Burners - Camping Grill - Bonfire - Ethanol Burners - 1000ml with Thank You Card.
features: Big K barbecue lighting gel is ideal for starting your barbecue in a safe manner.
1 litre; Safety cap; PET shatterproof bottle; Less risk of spillage.
Suitable for making a fire in almost all weather conditions
Safe and reliable barbeque lighting gel is all you need for running a variety of applications in the outdoors and barbeque.

Big K barbeque lighting gel will safely run a variety of devices in the outdoors. Including all of BBQs, Firepits, Indoor fires & log burners - Camping Grills and Bonfire. It is ideal ideal for camping, barbecue charcoal or any other bbq grill. Comes with complimentary Topline barbeque matches.
